# Project Structure

**Generated**: 2026-03-16 20:44:50

## Project Information

- **Name**: workspace-development-tools
- **Version**: 1.0.0
- **Description**: Development tools for Menschlichkeit Г–sterreich workspace

## Available Scripts

- `npm run install:all`: npm install --workspaces
- `npm run build:workspaces`: npm run build --workspaces --if-present
- `npm run test:all`: npm run test --workspaces
- `npm run lint:js`: eslint . --ext .js,.ts --fix
- `npm run lint:md`: markdownlint . --ignore node_modules --ignore vendor
- `npm run format`: prettier --write .
- `npm run format:check`: prettier --check .
- `npm run format:php`: composer exec php-cs-fixer fix
- `npm run lint:php`: composer exec phpstan analyse
- `npm run setup:dev`: npm run install:all && npm run setup:composer && npm run setup:environments
- `npm run setup:composer`: composer install --no-dev --optimize-autoloader
- `npm run setup:environments`: pwsh scripts/setup-environments.ps1
- `npm run clean`: node scripts/clean-workspace.mjs
- `npm run clean:dry-run`: node scripts/clean-workspace.mjs --dry-run
- `npm run clean:dist`: node scripts/clean-workspace.mjs --only=dist,build
- `npm run clean:node-modules`: node scripts/clean-workspace.mjs --only=node_modules
- `npm run dev:all`: concurrently "npm run dev:crm" "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:games"
- `npm run dev:crm`: php -S localhost:8000 -t apps/crm/web
- `npm run dev:api`: bash scripts/start-api-dev.sh
- `npm run dev:frontend`: npm run dev --workspace=@moe/frontend
- `npm run dev:games`: cd web && python -m http.server 3000
- `npm run dev:essential`: npm run dev --workspace=mcp-servers/essential-stack
- `npm run dev:web`: npm run dev --workspace=mcp-servers/web-stack
- `npm run build:all`: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:games && npm run build:api
- `npm run build:frontend`: npm run build:prerender --workspace=@moe/frontend
- `npm run build:frontend:csr`: npm run build --workspace=@moe/frontend
- `npm run build:games`: pwsh scripts/build-games.ps1
- `npm run build:api`: cd apps/api && python -m build
- `npm run test:integration`: playwright test
- `npm run test:unit`: vitest
- `npm run test:e2e`: npm run test:integration
- `npm run deploy:all`: npm run deploy:crm && npm run deploy:api && npm run deploy:frontend
- `npm run deploy:crm`: pwsh scripts/deploy-crm.ps1
- `npm run deploy:api`: pwsh scripts/deploy-api.ps1
- `npm run deploy:frontend`: pwsh scripts/deploy-frontend.ps1
- `npm run lint`: eslint .
- `npm run lint:sarif`: eslint . -f sarif -o eslint.sarif || true
- `npm run lint:all`: npm run lint:js && npm run lint:php && npm run lint:md
- `npm run format:all`: npm run format && npm run format:php
- `npm run quality:codacy`: node scripts/ci/run-codacy.mjs
- `npm run analyze:codacy`: node scripts/ci/run-codacy.mjs
- `npm run prepare`: husky install
- `npm run security:trivy`: node scripts/ci/run-trivy.mjs
- `npm run security:bandit`: node scripts/ci/run-bandit.mjs
- `npm run security:gitleaks`: node scripts/ci/run-gitleaks.mjs
- `npm run security:scan`: npm run security:trivy && npm run security:bandit && npm run security:gitleaks
- `npm run performance:lighthouse`: npm run lh:ci --workspace=@moe/frontend
- `npm run compliance:dsgvo`: pwsh scripts/dsgvo-check.ps1
- `npm run quality:reports`: node scripts/generate-quality-report.js
- `npm run quality:gates`: npm run quality:codacy && npm run security:scan && npm run performance:lighthouse && npm run compliance:dsgvo && npm run quality:reports
- `npm run logs:purge`: python3 scripts/purge-logs.py
- `npm run logs:purge:dry-run`: python3 scripts/purge-logs.py --dry-run --verbose
- `npm run figma:sync`: node scripts/figma-token-sync.cjs
- `npm run figma:sync:watch`: nodemon --watch figma-design-system scripts/figma-token-sync.cjs
- `npm run figma:integrate`: node scripts/figma-mcp-integration.mjs
- `npm run figma:components`: npm run figma:integrate
- `npm run figma:mcp:server`: node mcp-servers/figma-mcp-server/index.cjs
- `npm run figma:mcp:check`: node scripts/check-figma-mcp.mjs
- `npm run figma:generate`: node scripts/figma-mcp-integration.mjs
- `npm run figma:ws:start`: node dist/socket.js
- `npm run figma:ws:dev`: nodemon dist/socket.js
- `npm run figma:full-sync`: npm run figma:sync && npm run figma:integrate && npm run quality:gates
- `npm run design:tokens`: npm run figma:sync && npm run build:frontend
- `npm run tokens`: npm run design:tokens
- `npm run design:docs`: storybook build && npm run figma:sync
- `npm run n8n:start`: cd automation/n8n && docker-compose up -d
- `npm run n8n:stop`: cd automation/n8n && docker-compose down
- `npm run n8n:logs`: cd automation/n8n && docker-compose logs -f n8n
- `npm run n8n:restart`: npm run n8n:stop && npm run n8n:start
- `npm run n8n:webhook`: node automation/n8n/webhook-client.js
- `npm run n8n:setup`: cd automation/n8n && cp .env.example .env && echo 'Please configure automation/n8n/.env with your settings'
- `npm run n8n:smoke`: python3 automation/n8n/smoke-test.py
- `npm run docker:up`: docker-compose up -d
- `npm run docker:down`: docker-compose down
- `npm run docker:logs`: docker-compose logs -f
- `npm run docker:ps`: docker-compose ps
- `npm run docker:restart`: docker-compose restart
- `npm run db:migrate`: npx prisma migrate dev
- `npm run db:seed`: npx prisma db seed
- `npm run db:studio`: npx prisma studio
- `npm run db:reset`: npx prisma migrate reset
- `npm run status:check`: python3 scripts/codespace-status-check.py
- `npm run status:verbose`: python3 scripts/codespace-status-check.py --verbose
- `npm run status:json`: python3 scripts/codespace-status-check.py --json quality-reports/codespace-status.json
- `npm run mcp:check`: node scripts/mcp-check.mjs
- `npm run mcp:figma:health`: node scripts/figma-mcp-health.mjs
- `npm run mcp:health`: node scripts/mcp-health-simple.mjs

- vite: `^7.3.1`
